applicability_notes: Replaces torch softmax (torch.nn.Softmax / F.softmax). Equivalent unfused ttnn chain seen in models (safe_softmax): max -> sub -> exp -> sum -> add(eps) -> reciprocal -> mul, which ttnn.softmax(numeric_stable=True) fuses. When preceded by scale and additive mask, prefer ttnn.scale_mask_softmax.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, H, S, S] tiled attention scores
placement_observations.source: model call site: scores = ttnn.add(scores, mask_tt, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); attn_weights = ttnn.softmax(scores, dim=-1, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, H, S, S] tiled attention probabilities
placement_observations.source: model call site: attn_weights = ttnn.softmax(scores, dim=-1, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)
model call site safe_softmax: use fused ttnn.softmax only if x.shape[dim] < 4096, otherwise fall back to manual max/exp/sum/reciprocal/mul decomposition

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention probabilities reshaped/resharded for following matmul
placement_observations.source: model call site: attention_probs = ttnn.softmax(attention_scores, dim=-1, numeric_stable=False); attention_probs = ttnn.to_memory_config(attention_probs, memory_config=ttnn.create_sharded_memory_config(...))

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small [*, E] or top-k [*, k] routing tensors
placement_observations.source: MoE router call sites: ttnn.softmax(topk_values, dim=-1), ttnn.softmax(expert_weights, dim=1, numeric_stable=True, compute_kernel_config=softmax_compute_config)
